---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new detection or improvement for Windfall AntiCheat
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Feature Type
- [ ] New Cheat Detection
- [ ] Improvement to Existing Detection
- [ ] Configuration Option
- [ ] Performance Improvement
- [ ] Other

## Problem It Solves
Describe the problem this feature would address. What cheats or exploits would it help detect?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, examples, or links here (e.g., videos of the exploit, related issues).

## Compatibility
- **Minecraft Versions:** (e.g., 1.8-1.20)
- **Server Platforms:** (Paper, Spigot, Purpur, Folia, etc.)
